eventStreams.name: ProductionLineTelemetry
eventStreams.description: Real-time PLC/MES output from production lines — cycle times, unit counts, scrap per part
kqlAggregations: ProductionLineEvents | summarize GoodCount=countif(GoodUnit), DefectCount=countif(not(GoodUnit)), AvgCycle=avg(CycleTimeSeconds) by LineID, bin(Timestamp, 1m)
ProductionLineEvents | summarize TotalOutput=count(), ScrapRate=round(todouble(countif(not(GoodUnit))) / count() * 100, 2) by LineID, ProductID, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

eventStreams.name: QualityInspectionStream
eventStreams.description: Inline SPC measurement results from inspection stations
kqlAggregations: QualityInspectionEvents | summarize AvgMeasured=avg(MeasuredValue), StdDev=stdev(MeasuredValue), FailCount=countif(Result == 'Fail') by InspectionPointID, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
QualityInspectionEvents | summarize Cpk=round((min(UpperSpec) - max(LowerSpec)) / (6 * stdev(MeasuredValue)), 2) by InspectionPointID, ProductID, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

eventStreams.name: EquipmentSensors
eventStreams.description: IoT vibration, temperature, and power sensors on critical equipment
kqlAggregations: EquipmentSensorEvents | summarize AvgValue=avg(Value), MaxValue=max(Value), AlarmCount=countif(IsAlarm) by EquipmentID, SensorType, bin(Timestamp, 1m)
EquipmentSensorEvents | where IsAlarm | summarize AlarmCount=count() by EquipmentID, SensorType, bin(Timestamp, 5m) | where AlarmCount > 3

eventStreams.name: MaterialConsumption
eventStreams.description: Barcode scan events for material issues from warehouse to production
kqlAggregations: MaterialConsumptionEvents | summarize TotalIssued=sum(QuantityIssued), IssueCount=count() by MaterialID, bin(Timestamp, 1h)
MaterialConsumptionEvents | summarize TotalIssued=sum(QuantityIssued) by MaterialID, WarehouseID, bin(Timestamp, 1d)

bridgeQueries.name: ProductionBridge
bridgeQueries.description: Bridge hot production telemetry with cold production orders

bridgeQueries.name: QualityBridge
bridgeQueries.description: Bridge real-time SPC data with cold quality inspections

bridgeQueries.name: EquipmentHealthBridge
bridgeQueries.description: Bridge sensor data with maintenance work orders
